title: Rich Roasted German Apricot Skillet
description: A hearty German dish featuring roasted apricots and a mustardy emulsion sauce, perfect for a lazy Sunday, made in a cast-iron skillet with high protein ingredients.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Slice the onion and mince the garlic.
Cook the pork sausage in the cast-iron skillet over medium-high heat until browned.
Add the sliced onion to the skillet and cook until caramelized.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the apricots to the skillet and cook for 2 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the mustard, chicken broth, and pasta water.
Pour the emulsion sauce over the apricots and sausage in the skillet.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and roast for 20 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the oven and season with salt and black pepper.
